title: PIRATIX ADVENTURE WORLD Pirate Figures Set, Assorted Models, Includes Ship and Characters
features: ACTION PLAYSET: This set includes a vehicle and a Piratix figure, ready for exciting offshore adventures.
COLORFUL DESIGN - The vehicle has a striking green, purple and blue design, while the figure is a yellow pirate with sword.
EASY TO ASSEMBLE - The vehicle is quickly assembled without any tools.
Dynamic Mobility - Wheels allow the vehicle to glide smoothly on flat surfaces.
COMPACT SIZE - Ideal dimensions for indoor or outdoor play and easy to carry.
description: Product Description This is an assortment + one piece is sent randomly + one piece will be sent in one unit, PIRATIX ADVENTURE WORLD Pirate Figures Set, Assorted Models Includes Boat and Characters Safety Warning Those set by the manufacturer
